title: MrCreeperPack(dark)
body: This resoursepack is the result of thousands of hours of development, the resource pack does a lot, replaces ender pearl, swords, wool, more details in the screenshots, we also made a resource pack with a joke, namely, go to the ZIP file of the resource pack, you will find a folder there, this is the main resource pack, this is done so that the resource pack works on versions 1.19.4-1.20.1, it is recommended to install optifine to enjoy the charms of the resource pack completely, that's all
